sys_hub_flow.description: Daily check for donors who have become eligible again. Updates their status and sends notification.
sys_hub_flow.name: Donor Eligibility Restoration

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Find donors who are now eligible

sys_hub_flow_snapshot.description: Daily check for donors who have become eligible again. Updates their status and sends notification.
sys_hub_flow_snapshot.name: Donor Eligibility Restoration

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Find donors who are now eligible
